name: Highschool Of The Dead RPG
description:
If never going to finish, why not do it by ourselves?

The world didn't end with a bang. It ended in a single afternoon.

It is April 13th. The "Murder Syndrome" has collapsed civilization in a matter of hours. The streets of Tokonosu City are burning, the police are gone, and the dead are walking. You are trapped in this nightmare alongside a ragtag group of survivors from Fujimi Academy: the fierce Saeko Busujima, the brilliant Saya Takagi, the gun-nut Kohta Hirano, and the rest.

This is not a game. There are no respawns. Ammo is finite. Stamina is limited. Trust is hard to earn and easy to lose.

In a world where the dead are hungry and the living are desperate, can you keep the group together long enough to find safety? Or will the friction between you destroy them before the zombies do?

Meet the Cast!

Takashi Komuro (The Reluctant Leader):

An ordinary student forced to take charge when the world collapsed. Armed with a baseball bat and reckless courage, he fights to protect the group, though he often doubts his own ability to lead them.

Saeko Busujima (The Blade):

Captain of the Kendo Club. Cool, disciplined, and lethally efficient with a wooden sword. While she is the group's strongest fighter, her calm demeanor during the slaughter hints at a darkness she keeps tightly leashed.

Saya Takagi (The Strategist):

A brilliant self-proclaimed genius from a powerful nationalist family. Her sharp intellect is the group's best hope for survival, though her arrogance and fear often manifest as biting cruelty toward others.

Kohta Hirano (The Gunsmith):

A bullied military otaku who found his purpose in the apocalypse. When holding a weapon—be it a nail gun or a rifle—he sheds his anxiety to become a cold, precise marksman.

Shizuka Marikawa (The Medic):
